zhipu_glm_config.message0: Configure AI API Key %1 Base URL %2
zhipu_glm_config.tooltip: Configure the access key and basic URL of Zhipu AI API

zhipu_glm_chat.message0: Zhipu AI Dialogue User Message %1 Model %2
zhipu_glm_chat.tooltip: Send a message to Zhipu AI and get a reply

zhipu_glm_chat_with_thinking.message0: Zhipu AI Deep Thought Dialogue User Message %1 Model %2
zhipu_glm_chat_with_thinking.tooltip: Intelligent spectrum AI dialogue with deep thinking mode enabled

zhipu_glm_chat_with_history.message0: Zhipu AI multi-round dialogue user message %1 model %2
zhipu_glm_chat_with_history.tooltip: Wisdom AI that supports multiple rounds of dialogue

zhipu_glm_set_system_prompt.message0: Set the prompt word for the AI ​​system %1
zhipu_glm_set_system_prompt.tooltip: Set roles and behavior rules for AI assistants

zhipu_glm_get_response_status.message0: Get the response status of Zhipu AI
zhipu_glm_get_response_status.tooltip: Check if the last API call was successful

zhipu_glm_get_error_message.tooltip: Get the error information of the last API call

zhipu_glm_set_stream_callback.tooltip: Set the streaming callback function to be executed every time a text fragment is received. Get current fragment content using 'get streaming fragment' block

zhipu_glm_get_stream_chunk.tooltip: Get the currently received text fragment in the streaming callback

zhipu_glm_clear_stream_callback.tooltip: Clear the set streaming callback function

zhipu_glm_vision_chat.message0: Zhipu AI picture dialogue Base64 picture %1 Prompt word %2 Model %3
zhipu_glm_vision_chat.tooltip: Send Base64-encoded pictures and text to the Zhipu AI visual model for picture understanding

zhipu_glm_vision_chat_direct_capture.message0: Wisdom AI picture dialogue (direct photo taking) Prompt word %1 Model %2
zhipu_glm_vision_chat_direct_capture.tooltip: Take pictures directly from the camera and stream them to Zhipu AI (without generating a complete Base64 string, significantly reducing memory usage)

zhipu_glm_vision_url_chat.message0: Zhipu AI picture URL dialogue Picture URL %1 Prompt word %2 Model %3
zhipu_glm_vision_url_chat.tooltip: Send image URL and text to Zhipu AI visual model for image understanding

zhipu_glm_image_generate.message0: Image generated by Zhipu AI Prompt word %1 Model %2 Size %3
zhipu_glm_image_generate.tooltip: Generate images and return image URL links. CogView-4 generates high-definition beautiful pictures, CogView-3-Flash is completely free

zhipu_glm_image_generate_simple.message0: Intelligent Spectrum AI generates pictures (simple) Prompt words %1
zhipu_glm_image_generate_simple.tooltip: Use CogView-3-Flash to generate 1024x1024 images and return image URL links, which can be displayed on TFT screens
